description: LitigationOS MCP v3 Enhancement Layer — 9 new tools across 5 categories

dashboard.description: Case-level health, threat, and pipeline views

tools.name: litigation_case_health
tools.description: Get case health dashboard from v_case_health view — counts of quotes, harms, impeachment points, contradictions, claims, and deadline status.

tools.name: litigation_adversary_threats
tools.description: Get adversary threat matrix ranked by harm count with critical counts and category spread.

limit.description: Maximum number of adversaries to return.

tools.name: litigation_filing_pipeline
tools.description: Get filing pipeline status — every filing action with phase, readiness %, risk score, tier, gaps filled/remaining, and sequencing.

tools.name: litigation_dedup_status
tools.description: Get aggregate deduplication statistics — total files, unique hashes, exact/near duplicates, pending review, drives scanned.

tools.name: litigation_dedup_duplicates
tools.description: List identified duplicate files with path, size, SHA-256, canonical reference, and action status.

drive.description: Filter by drive letter (e.g., 'C'). Omit for all drives.

limit.description: Maximum number of duplicates to return.

tools.name: litigation_drive_summary
tools.description: Get per-drive file summary — file count, total bytes, unique names, duplicates found, files moved, files pending.

tools.name: litigation_drive_org_log
tools.description: Get drive organization action log — file-move and reorganization actions with status filtering.

status.description: Filter by action status (e.g., 'completed', 'pending'). Omit for all.

tools.name: litigation_query_benchmarks
tools.description: Get recent query performance benchmarks — query name, execution time (ms), row count, timestamp.

tools.name: litigation_agent_inventory
tools.description: List all Copilot agents and skills — counts and sorted inventory from .copilot/agents and .copilot/skills directories.
